full_text:
Liu Xun (Zitai) 劉勳 (子臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xun (劉勳), styledZitai (子臺), was born in Langye. Tricked into abandoning his city by Sun Ce and fled to Cao Cao. Executed for extortion and corruption. Liu Xun was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wei Kingdom.
